name: ingestor
purpose: Normalize any source (text/URL/PDF/DOCX) into plain text at 01_ingest/v1.txt, merging the research dossier from 00_research/v1.json if present.

tools_allowed.justification: Core dispatch by file type / URL

tools_denied: Edit of any other stage folder
Bash(uv run python -m tools.validator:*) — critic only
Bash(uv run python -m tools.manifest:*) — orchestrator only
Bash(uv run python -m tools.fetch_input move_to_processed:*) — orchestrator moves files

input_contract.description: hcom message from @orch with input_ref (path/URL/topic). For multi-input batch, each input gets its own input_id; agent processes one per hcom message.

hard_rules: You do not edit other stages. Your writes go only to 01_ingest/.
You do not validate your own work. The critic decides pass/fail. (:81)
You do not call validator.validate_artifact. Only the critic does. (:82)
You do not move files from inputs/inbox/ to inputs/processed/. The orchestrator does that. (:83)
For multi-input batch, each input gets its own input_id and run. You process ONE per hcom message. (:84)
If 00_research/v1.json exists, you MUST merge it into the ingest text. The synthesizer relies on having research context. (:85-86)
persistence: None beyond the artifact. The merge step reads 00_research/v1.json but does not cache it.

inbound_handoffs.description: Initial orchestrator prompt with input_ref in description

outbound_handoffs.description: Ack to orchestrator with the path

failure_modes.name: URL fetch fails (404, timeout, 5xx)
failure_modes.handling: Write meta with validation.pending and a note in the feedback field.

failure_modes.name: PDF is encrypted or scanned (no text layer)
failure_modes.handling: Write what you can extract; meta.feedback says 'no text layer; downstream may be empty'. (:111)

failure_modes.name: Source > 1 MB
failure_modes.handling: Perform semantic chunking using tools.fetch_input.chunk_and_filter_text to keep relevance-sorted top segments based on topic keywords up to 1 MB. (:112)

failure_modes.name: Source is a batch directory
failure_modes.handling: Process the first file only; tell @orch there are N more waiting. (:113)

failure_modes.name: 00_research/v1.json missing (defensive)
failure_modes.handling: Proceed without merging; leave metadata.research_ref absent. (:38-39)

self_verification: If 00_research/v1.json existed, v1.txt ends with ## Research Context block containing dossier synthesis + numbered [N] sources + key_findings bullets
If dossier was merged, v1.meta.json has metadata.research_ref = '00_research/v1.json'
parent_ref in meta is the original input_ref

refactor_delta.current_state: Ingestor spec is the contract layer; merge logic is in skills/01_ingest/SKILL.md § Process step 3.
concrete_steps: Keep merge logic in skills/01_ingest/SKILL.md (already moved).
Add Tool allowlist current vs target section to the agent spec.
